attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
CASE WHEN MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.AMOUNT_LIMIT > 99999999999999999999.9999999
           THEN 0
     ELSE MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.AMOUNT_LIMIT
END AMOUNT_LIMIT     , MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.ATTRIBUTE1, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.ATTRIBUTE2, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.ATTRIBUTE3, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.ATTRIBUTE4, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.ATTRIBUTE5, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.ATTRIBUTE6, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.ATTRIBUTE7, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.CONTROL_GROUP_ID, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.CONTROL_RULE_ID, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.CREATED_BY, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.CREATION_DATE, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.GES_UPDATE_DATE, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.GLOBAL_NAME, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.INACTIVE_DATE, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.LOCATION_ID, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.OBJECT_CODE, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.PROGRAM_ID, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.REQUEST_ID, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.RULE_TYPE_CODE, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.SEGMENT2_HIGH, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.SEGMENT2_LOW, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.SEGMENT3_HIGH, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.SEGMENT3_LOW, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.SEGMENT4_HIGH, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.SEGMENT4_LOW, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.SEGMENT5_HIGH, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.SEGMENT5_LOW, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.SEGMENT6_HIGH, MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES.SEGMENT6_LOW 
FROM
 MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES where  MF_PO_CONTROL_RULES. GES_UPDATE_DATE
>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
